generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our allies take advantage of our generosity. Why should we keep pouring resources into NATO when they won't even meet their 2% spending commitments? It's time to put America first and demand real burden-sharing. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
